testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: User was NOT navigated to the dashboard! expected [true] but found [false]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: User was NOT navigated to the dashboard! expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at stepDefinitions.LoginSteps1.user_navigated_to_dashboard(LoginSteps1.java:33) at ✽.user is navigated to ihms dashboard(file:///C:/Users/intern2/git/repository/cucumber/src/test/resources/features/1_login.feature:25)
